zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston於1354年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯格爾曼斯頓時，他的父親Sir Robert Preston 1st Baron of Gormaston25歲，母親Margeret de Bermingham14歲。他和Elizabeth de Loundres至少有1個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1430年在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼卡藍凱爾斯享年76歲。

nameMeanings.name: Preston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from one of the many places (most notably one in Lancashire) so called from Old English prēost ‘priest’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.
occasionally from Middle English prest + son ‘son of the priest’. Priests were forbidden marriage but many produced illegitimate offspring.

variants.name: Presson
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of   Preston  .
French: occupational name for a presser of wine or oil, from a derivative of presser ‘to press’.

variants.name: Prestwich
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place in Lancashire (now Greater Manchester), so called from Old English prēost ‘priest’ + wīc ‘outlying settlement’, or from other places with the same derivation. Variants such as Prestidge, Prestage, etc., parallel the local pronunciation of the Lancashire name. Compare Preston .

nameMeanings.name: Christopher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston was born in 1354, in Gormanston, County Meath, Ireland, his father, Sir Robert Preston 1st Baron of Gormaston, was 25 and his mother, Margeret de Bermingham, was 14. He had at least 1 son and 4 daughters with Elizabeth de Loundres. He died in 1430, in Kells, Callan, County Kilkenny, Ireland, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston est né en 1354, à Gormanston, County Meath, Irlande, son père, Sir Robert Preston 1st Baron of Gormaston, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margeret de Bermingham, avait 14 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles avec Elizabeth de Loundres. Il est décédé en 1430, à Kells, Callan, County Kilkenny, Irlande, à l’âge de 76 ans.

Er hatte mit Elizabeth de Loundres mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1430 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Kells, Callan, County Kilkenny, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston è nato il nel 1354 nel Gormanston, County Meath, Irlanda, il suo padre, Sir Robert Preston 1st Baron of Gormaston, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Margeret de Bermingham, aveva 14 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie con Elizabeth de Loundres. Morì nel 1430, nel Kells, Callan, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanstonが1354年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスゴルマンストンで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Preston 1st Baron of Gormastonは25歳，母Margeret de Berminghamは14歳であった。彼はElizabeth de Loundresとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1430年にアイルランドコウントイ キルケニーカランケルズで76歳で死去した。

ko.Carbury and Dunfierth, County Kildare, I: 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르 카버이 앤드 던피르스
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston(이)가 1354년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 고먼스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Preston 1st Baron of Gormaston(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Margeret de Bermingham(은)는 14세였다. 그는 Elizabeth de Loundres(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1430년 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 캘런 켈스에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston nasceu em 1354, em Gormanston, County Meath, Irlanda, seu pai, Sir Robert Preston 1st Baron of Gormaston, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margeret de Bermingham, tinha 14 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas com Elizabeth de Loundres. Ele faleceu em 1430, em Kells, Callan, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, com 76 anos.

ru.Carbury and Dunfierth, County Kildare, I: карбури анд дунфиирт, коунти каилдар, Ирландия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston родился в 1354 г. в местности горманстон, коунти мит, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Preston 1st Baron of Gormaston было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margeret de Bermingham, 14. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери от Elizabeth de Loundres. Он умер в 1430 г. в местности келлс, каллан, коунти килкенни, Ирландия в возрасте 76 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas con Elizabeth de Loundres. Murió en 1430, en Kells, Callan, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, a la edad de 76 años.
